title: Liminal Paintings
description: DyoudiM!'s liminal-vibe artwork added to Minecraft as paintings!
body:
### Warning/Note

If you download the datapack version, a resourcepack is **required**! If you are planning to use the datapack version, please manually go into the versions tab, choose the version you want, and download BOTH of the TWO attached files! The main one will be the datapack itself, and the "additional" one is the resourcepack required! If you do not do this, all paintings will have no defined texture and turn into pink and black checkerboard patterns!

**All links in the sidebar are DyoudiM!'s links, and are not related to me in any way.**

---

***DyoudiM!'s liminal-vibe artwork added to Minecraft as paintings!***

Currently there are **69** paintings added.
*(That number is NOT intentional, it is a coincidence)*

For **datapack** versions **below** 1.2.30:
To check credits in-game, you can use `/function tbdlp:credits`.
To give yourself ALL the paintings, use `/function tbdlp:all`.

For **datapack** versions 1.2.30 or **over**:
To check credits in-game, you can use `/function liminalpaintings:credits`.
To give yourself ALL the paintings, use `/function liminalpaintings:all`.

All credits for the artworks go to **[DyoudiM!](https://x.com/DyoudiM)**.

---

### Versions
- **Datapack** version: Includes a Datapack & a Resourcepack.
- **Custom Paintings** version: Includes a Custom Paintings pack that requires the [Custom Paintings mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-paintings-mod). `Modloader will say Datapack, although it's not. It does not have a resourcepack option as the first uploaded version was a datapack.`

### Installation
To install the **datapack** version, first go into the versions tab, choose your version (must be labeled with "Datapack") and download **both** files attached, one is the datapack, the other (labeled "Resources" and is "additional") is a resourcepack.
Put the resourcepack in your resourcepack folder like normal.
Put the datapack in the "datapacks" folder in your already-existing world, or if it's a new world, add it during world creation.

To install the **custom paintings** version, first go into the versions tab, choose your version (Must be labled with "Custom Paintings") and download the file. Next make sure you have the Custom Paintings mod installed. If not, download it at [https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-paintings-mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-paintings-mod).

To add the custom paintings pack to your world, you can follow the tutorial in the page's description ([https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-paintings-mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-paintings-mod)).

Simply press `U` or whatever key you have set for opening the Custom Painting's mod menu **while in a world**. Then choose to manage packs, open the folder, and put the file into the folder. You can now close the folder, return to the game and choose to reload packs, ensure that the pack is listed, and done!

---
